headline: APA Corp (NASDAQ:APA) Shows a Technical Breakout Setup with Strong Ratings
summary: APA Corp (APA) shows a strong technical setup with a 7 Technical Rating and 8 Setup Rating, forming a tight consolidation base near resistance for a potential breakout opportunity.

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on APA, Lowers Price Target to $45
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Biju Perincheril   maintains APA (NASDAQ:APA) with a Positive and lowers the price target from $47 to $45.
